Name: best_serving_cell_ID_per_ue_based_on_CRS
Description: ID of the serving cell for each UE, where the selection is based on measurements over the common reference signal (CRS). Used for LTE cells that do not employ massive MIMO arrays. In LTE or NR cells with massive MIMO arrays, this represents an association considering only the antenna gain from a single element, not from the full array.

Name: best_serving_CRS_coupling_gain_dB
Description: Coupling gain between the UE and its serving cell based on CRS-based selection. Represents the link budget gain, accounting for path loss, shadowing, outdoor-to-indoor penetration loss, and antenna/array gain.

Name: best_serving_CRS_distance_3d_m
Description: 3D distance between each UE and its serving cell based on CRS-based selection.

Name: best_serving_CRS_re_noise_per_ue_dBm
Description: Received noise power per resource element at the UE, typically used in SNR or SINR computations for CRS.

Name: best_serving_CRS_rsrp_per_ue_dBm
Description: Reference Signal Received Power (RSRP) measured by each UE from its serving cell based on its serving CRS. Reflects the average received power of resource elements carrying such  CRS.

Name: best_serving_cell_ID_per_ue_based_on_SSB
Description: ID of the serving cell for each UE, where the selection is based on measurements over the synchronization signal block (SSB). Used for LTE and NR cells that employ massive MIMO arrays. In LTE cells, there is only one SSB, which represents the CRS.

Name: best_serving_SSB_per_ue
Description: ID of the serving SSB beam (coverage) for each UE, where the selection is based on SSB measurements.

Name: best_serving_SSB_coupling_gain_dB
Description: Coupling gain between the UE and its serving cell based on SSB-based selection. Represents the link budget gain, accounting for path loss, shadowing, outdoor-to-indoor penetration loss, and antenna/array gain, considering SSB precoding.

Name: best_serving_SSB_distance_3d_m
Description: 3D distance between each UE and its serving cell based on SSB-based selection.

Name: best_serving_SSB_re_noise_per_ue_dBm
Description: Received noise power per resource element at the UE, typically used in SNR or SINR computations for SSB.

Name: best_serving_SSB_rsrp_per_ue_dBm
Description: Reference Signal Received Power (RSRP) measured by each UE from its serving cell based on its serving SSB. Reflects the average received power of resource elements carrying such SSB.

Name: best_serving_CSI_RS_per_ue
Description: ID of the serving CSI-RS beam (data channel) for each UE, where the selection is based on CSI-RS measurements.

Name: best_serving_CSI_RS_rsrp_per_ue_dBm
Description: Reference Signal Received Power (RSRP) measured by each UE from its serving CSI-RS. Reflects the average received power of resource elements carrying such CSI-RS.

Name: effective_CSI_RS_sinr_ue_to_cell_dB
Description: Effective SINR of each UE with respect to its assigned CSI-RS beam from the serving cell, measured in decibels (dB). Computed using a mapping function (e.g., EESM or MIESM) that aggregates the per-PRB SINRs allocated to the UE by that cell.

Name: ue_throughput_based_on_eff_CSI_RS_SINR_per_PRB_Mbps
Description: Downlink throughput achieved by each UE, measured in megabits per second (Mbps), computed using the Shannon capacity formula and the effective SINR over all PRBs assigned to that UE.

Name: ue_throughput_based_on_ins_CSI_RS_SINR_per_PRB_Mbps
Description: Downlink throughput achieved by each UE, measured in megabits per second (Mbps), computed as the sum of the rates of all PRBs assigned to that UE. For each PRB, the rate is calculated using the Shannon capacity formula based on its instantaneous SINR.

Name: ue_throughput_per_carrier_Mbps
Description: Downlink throughput achieved by each UE on a given carrier, measured in megabits per second (Mbps).

Name: cell_throughput_Mbps
Description: Total downlink throughput achieved by each cell, measured in megabits per second (Mbps). Represents the aggregated data rate across all scheduled UEs served by that cell.

Name: carrier_throughput_Mbps
Description: Total downlink throughput measured over a specific carrier in megabits per second (Mbps). It reflects the combined data rate across all cells operating on that carrier, including all scheduled UEs.

Name: power_consumption_perRadio_kW
Description: The power consumed by each radio deployed in the network

Name: network_power_consumption_per_radioType_kW
Description: The total power consumed from each different radio type deployed in the netwok

Name: total_network_power_consumption_kW
Description: The total aggregated power consumed by all base stations of the network.

Name: ues_per_cell_based_on_CRS
Description: Number of UEs associated with each cell based on CRS-based selection.

Name: ues_per_cell
Description: Number of UEs associated with each cell based on SSB-based selection.

Name: ues_per_SSB_beam
Description: Number of UEs associated with each SSB beam based on the corresponding SSB-based selection.

Name: ues_per_CSI_RS_beam
Description: Number of UEs served by each CSI-RS beam based on the corresponding CSI-RS-based selection.

Name: cell_activity_per_ue
Description: Binary mask indicating the cells that were actively transmitting from the UE’s perspective at the time it was transmitting or receiving data.

Name: SSB_beam_activity_per_ue
Description: Binary mask indicating the SSB beams that were actively transmitting from the UE’s perspective at the time it performed the SSB measurement. Recall that SSB beams are swept sequentially over time.

Name: CSI_RS_beam_activity_per_ue
Description: Binary mask indicating the CSI-RS beams that were actively transmitting from the UE’s perspective at the time it was transmitting or receiving data.

Name: CRS_usefulPower_ue_dBm
Description: Received power of the useful signal from the serving CRS for each UE, measured in decibels-milliwatts (dBm).

Name: CRS_interfPower_ue_dBm
Description: Total interference power received by each UE over the serving CRS, measured in decibels-milliwatts (dBm).

Name: CRS_RSRP_no_fast_fading_ue_to_cell_dBm
Description: CRS RSRP measured by each UE from its serving cell, excluding fast fading effects. Useful for evaluating long-term signal strength and planning.

Name: CRS_sinr_ue_to_cell_dB
Description: SINR of the CRS measured by each UE from its serving cell, expressed in decibels (dB). Computed as the ratio of useful CRS power to interference plus noise.

Name: SSB_usefulPower_ue_dBm
Description: Received power of the useful signal from the serving SSB beam for each UE, measured in decibels-milliwatts (dBm).

Name: SSB_interfPower_ue_dBm
Description: Total interference power received by each UE over the serving SSB beam, measured in decibels-milliwatts (dBm).

Name: SSB_RSRP_no_fast_fading_ue_to_cell_dBm
Description: SSB RSRP measured by each UE from its serving cell, excluding fast fading effects. Useful for long-term signal quality evaluation and planning.

Name: SSB_sinr_ue_to_cell_dB
Description: SINR of the SSB signal measured by each UE from its serving cell, expressed in decibels (dB). Computed as the ratio of useful signal power to interference plus noise.
